name: AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp.
summary: PART I AI Infrastructure Acquisition Corp. (the Company, AIIA, we, us, or our) is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on May 13, 2025. We were formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the Business Combination).
